title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 28.130 - Reports
text:
28.130.  Reports. — He shall report to the general assembly, either branch thereof, or to the governor, at the times and covering the matters requested.
(RSMo 1939 § 13005, A.L. 1945 p. 1724, A.L. 1959 H.B. 119) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11383; 1919 § 11624; 1909 § 11195
